name: DisplayPipelineAttributes.BackfaceStyle
summary: Values for changing the display of the backface (the side opposite of the surface normal direction).

enum_values.name: CullBackfaces
enum_values.summary: Surfaces viewed from the back will be transparent.

enum_values.name: UseObjectColor
enum_values.summary: Surfaces viewed from the back use the color specified in the object's display properties.

enum_values.name: SingleColorAllBackfaces
enum_values.summary: All backfaces display a specified color regardless of the object color.

enum_values.name: CustomMaterialAllBackfaces
enum_values.summary: Use a custom material for all backfaces.
